response.overview: Sacramento and Reynaldo, lifelong friends and members of a rising musical group, begin to gain recognition in their local scene. Their success, however, attracts the attention of Don Eliseo, a powerful figure who forces them to use their band as a front for his illegal operations.  Under the control of Don Eliseo and his ruthless enforcer Tobias, the group becomes entangled in a dangerous world where loyalty is constantly tested. As pressure grows, Reynaldo begins to resent Sacramento, believing he receives more attention and favors.  Fuelled by jealousy and manipulation, their once unbreakable friendship begins to fracture.  In a world where ambition and power overshadow everything, Sacramento and Reynaldo must decide whether their bond can survive — or if betrayal will tear them apart forever.
response.title: Falsos Amigos
